interpretation.claim_boundary: Scenario values are sensitivity calculations from SEM paths and assumed nudge effectiveness. They are not causal impact, visitor-volume, revenue, or opportunity-gap forecasts.
interpretation.formula: estimated_intention_shift = max(-friction_code_path_to_satisfaction, 0) * prevalence_among_reporters * satisfaction_to_intention_path * assumed_effectiveness * assumed_reach

friction_codes.label: Transport / Access
friction_codes.example_intervention: Publish a consolidated English-language transit guide at Fukui Station and on the DMO website covering bus, train, and rental options to key POIs; note infrequent service and recommend combining destinations on the same route.

friction_codes.label: Opening Hours / Availability
friction_codes.example_intervention: Standardise and keep up-to-date: Google Maps hours, official website, and physical entrance signage; flag seasonal closures at least 4 weeks in advance on all channels; add a 'check before you visit' note on DMO listings for POIs with variable hours.

friction_codes.label: Cleanliness / Comfort
friction_codes.example_intervention: Introduce a visible scheduled maintenance log at restrooms and high-footfall areas; add seating and shade at key viewing points where practicable.

friction_codes.label: Food / Amenities Gap
friction_codes.example_intervention: Post a nearby dining guide (English, with opening hours) at the attraction entrance; for remote sites, add a 'bring food and water' advisory to pre-visit materials; flag the nearest convenience store on the site map.

friction_codes.label: Itinerary Fit / Time & Cost
friction_codes.example_intervention: Publish DMO-curated half-day and full-day itinerary templates that pair lower-traffic or remote attractions with anchor destinations on the same transport corridor; include realistic travel time estimates.

friction_codes.label: Wayfinding / Signage
friction_codes.example_intervention: Install English-language directional signage at key route decision points (station exits, car parks, trailheads); supplement with QR codes linking to a mobile-friendly map of the site.

friction_codes.label: Waiting / Crowding
friction_codes.example_intervention: Add visit timing guidance to the attraction website and Google Maps listing (e.g. 'quietest before 10am on weekdays'); consider a simple real-time or estimated crowd-level indicator at the entrance.

friction_codes.label: Accessibility / Mobility
friction_codes.example_intervention: Map and publish step-free and wheelchair-accessible routes for each attraction; indicate surface type, gradient, and lift/ramp availability on the website and at the entrance.
